summary: v5 audit: 0 critical flags, 2 v5-specific major flags (M1 std-range read ambiguity in new §4 sentence, M2 cross-metric separation arithmetic in same sentence), 1 carry-forward major (M3 page count 20pp under user opt-out). v4's M1 (internal-memo cites) is fully resolved by Appendix A/B inlining and refs.bib deletion. v4's M3 (12-vs-13 β-independence) is fully resolved by §3 prose now correctly saying '12 of 13 (κ,c) rows' and identifying the splitter (κ=0.9, c=0.5). Table 1 row counts (κ=0.1 6+3; κ=0.3 6/6; κ=0.5 6+3; κ=0.7 6/6; κ=0.9 7+2) all reconcile to Nash results.json. PPO class-mean numbers (0.180/0.107/0.059/-0.049) and separations (0.073/0.048/0.108) reconcile to recalibrated_verdict.json. 4×-budget mean -0.108 reconciles to longbudget JSON. Compile clean: 3/3 pdflatex passes exit 0, 0 warnings, 0 overfull/underfull boxes, 0 unresolved citations, 20 pages.
compile_status: clean (3 pdflatex passes + bibtex exit 0; 0 warnings; 0 overfull/underfull; 0 unresolved citations)

highest_value_spot_checks.appendix_a_b_transcription: no transcription errors detected on spot-checked sections; Ã=36.24, A=1812, κ-thresholds 0.028/0.030/0.65/0.972 all faithful to memos

most_important_flag: M2: §4 Results paragraph claims class-mean separations (0.073, 0.048, 0.108) where the third separation crosses gap_closed_ne (asym, 0.059) and gap_closed_homogeneous (collapse, -0.049). The arithmetic is correct but the metric switch is not asterisked in the load-bearing ordering-not-significance sentence. Fix: either flag the cross-metric arithmetic in one sub-clause, or restate the separations under the consistent homogeneous-metric Caveats numbers (0.051/0.050/0.033/-0.049).
